warnings: One or more root accounts still need their externally configured password rotated to a unique value.

entries.purpose: Pending rotation target for the gmail root account.
notes: A unique replacement password is stored under .secrets/generated-service-credentials.env and should be applied to the live gmail account, then reflected back into the bootstrap credentials file.
